mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drone_latest (drone_id, ts, lat, lon, alt, battery_pct, rssi) VALUES (#{droneId}, #{ts}, #{lat}, #{lon}, #{alt}, #{batteryPct}, #{rssi}) ON CONFLICT (drone_id) DO UPDATE SET ts = EXCLUDED.ts, lat = EXCLUDED.lat, lon = EXCLUDED.lon, alt = EXCLUDED.alt, battery_pct = EXCLUDED.battery_pct, rssi = EXCLUDED.rssi
